---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new helper script
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that the scripts don't support yet?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it depends on data from an endpoint, include a
sample (redacted) response if you have one — that's what makes it feasible.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've already tried.

**Additional context**
Anything else: screenshots, links, the setup you're targeting.
